====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Flint
|width=74
|pkmn=Rapidash
|type1=Fire
|img=Flint Rapidash DPA.png
|epnum=DPA24
|epname=Hareta's Heart's Desire
|desc={{p|Rapidash}} was the first Pokémon used in the battle against Hareta. It went up against his Empoleon where it was able to knock it out despite the type-disadvantage.

Rapidash's known moves are {{m|Agility}}, {{m|Sunny Day}}, and {{m|Solar Beam}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Flint
|pkmn=Drifblim
|type1=Ghost
|type2=Flying
|img=Flint Drifblim DPA.png
|epnum=DPA24
|epname=Hareta's Heart's Desire
|desc={{p|Drifblim}} was used to finish off Hareta's {{p|Misdreavus}} seeing that Hareta could not use both Misdreavus and {{TP|Hareta|Regigigas}} at the same time as it was against the rules to do so. However, after Drifblim went for an attack, it was stopped by Misdreavus's {{m|Skill Swap}} which resulted in both side's Pokémon being knocked out as Misdreavus used Drifblim's Ability {{a|Aftermath}} from the effect of Skill Swap.

Drifblim's only known move is {{m|Payback}}, and its Ability is {{a|Aftermath}}{{tt|*|Skill Swapped by Hareta's Misdreavus}}.}}

=====Mentioned=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Flint
|pkmn=Steelix
|type1=Steel
|type2=Ground
|img=208Steelix.png
|epnum=DPA24
|epname=Hareta's Heart's Desire
|desc=After both Drifblim and Rapidash got knocked out, Flint mentions that he has a {{p|Steelix}}, but does not want to send it out for the match as he knows that it wouldn't stand a chance against [[Hareta's Regigigas]].

None of Steelix's moves are known.}}
